title: debug_enter
description: Emitted when the kernel enters a debugger session. level=maxima covers Maxima's dbm break loop (entered from merror when *mdebug* is truthy, or from a tripped breakpoint). level=lisp covers SBCL's *debugger-hook*. depth tracks nesting; pair with the corresponding debug_leave.

depth.description: Nesting level the kernel is now at (1-based).

condition_type.description: For level=lisp, the condition's class name as a string. Null for level=maxima.

message.description: Human-readable error message. For level=maxima this is the message field of $error; for level=lisp it is the printed condition.
